  createCascoApplication(
    insurer_name: $insurer_name
    insurer_age: $insurer_age
    phone: $phone
    email: $email
    vehicle_market_price: $vehicle_market_price
    manufacture_year: $manufacture_year
    type: $type
    vehicle_brand_id: $vehicle_brand_id
    vehicle_model_id: $vehicle_model_id
    vehicle_registration_city_id: $vehicle_registration_city_id
    agree: $agree
  )
}"}
